Scoreboard Overlay

Live Scoreboard Overlay

Display scores on stream or in front of cameras

Standalone App:

This is a separate Vite-based vanilla JS app.

It connects to the same AceBase database for real-time score updates.

Quick Links:

Available Scoreboards

Standard Scoreboard

Basic scoreboard for any sport

Table Tennis

Scoreboard with game tracking

Pickleball

Pickleball-specific scoring
